productName: M80 Dynalite 1/2g Dutch Treat (Harmony) & Blueberry (Sativa Group / PR) (I)
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Dutch Treat, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of pine, sweet, and earthy, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
